title: Retire on Hyperliquid with @luckyponds
summary_title: HyperFrogs NFTs and Lucky Ponds: Building gambling games on HyperVM
summary_description: Bernie discusses launching HyperFrogs, an on-chain ASCII NFT collection, and Lucky Ponds, a decentralized lottery with revenue sharing for frog holders.

key_moments.label: Host introduces Bernie, Cosmos OG dev now building on HyperLiquid
Bernie explains motivations for launching HyperFrogs on HyperEVM and learning Solidity
Bernie discusses migration issues with original HyperFrog contract and community response
Host explains why Hyperliquid attracts builders over Cosmos: more liquidity and active users
Lucky Ponds lottery game mechanics and 7% fee revenue sharing with HyperFrogs holders
Lucky Ponds goes live with daily, weekly, monthly pools and NFT collaboration promotions
Bernie explains hyper mode five-minute pools, PvP mechanics, and whale protection features
Security discussion: contract design, VRF challenges, and protections against validator exploitation
